title: Minimum Garden Perimeter to Collect Enough Apples
titleCn: 收集足够苹果的最小花园周长

testcases.input: neededApples = 1 Output: 8 Explanation: A square plot of side length 1 does not contain any apples. However, a square plot of side length 2 has 12 apples inside (as depicted in the image above). The perimeter is 2 * 4 = 8.
testcases.expectedOutput: 8 Explanation: A square plot of side length 1 does not contain any apples. However, a square plot of side length 2 has 12 apples inside (as depicted in the image above). The perimeter is 2 * 4 = 8.
